name: cyber-essentials-plus
description: UK NCSC Cyber Essentials Plus (CE+) v3.3 Danzell — Reference plugin with evidence checklist, scope determination, and SCF-backed gap assessment. Five core controls: Firewalls, Secure Configuration, User Access Control, Malware Protection, and Patch Management.
